item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 07 Apr 2026
item.description:
1. restricted 2.0.0 limit which system operations and which parts of the filesystem your program can access
  2. Job offer: compiler engineer for Catala @ CNAF (social benefits agency)
  3. ocgtk 0.1: OCaml bindings for GTK 4 (preview release)
  4. out-channel-redirect 0.1 — Redirect and capture out_channel output
  5. ppxlib.0.38.0
  6. A Proposal for Voluntary AI Disclosure in OCaml Code
  7. Blog: OCaml documentation as markdown
  8. hotseat Squava (a tiny LablGtk2 demo)
  9. opentelemetry 0.90 (and associated libraries)
  10. Dune 3.22
